MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Karen Farnsworth. Plaintiff James F. Blanding appeared in pro per and Defendant, Rickey Lee Wheathersby appeared in pro per. The case settled per oral stipulation of parties, read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
